news.title: Engineering Open House 'Forging the Future' builds toward high-tech tomorrow
news.summary_en: The 2026 Engineering Open House, the nation's largest student-run STEM fair, takes over Bardeen Quadrangle with over 200 exhibits centered around the theme 'Forging the Future'.
news.author: Blake Noble
